title: An Act to Enhance Public Safety in Maine by Defining the Relationship Between Local and Federal Law Enforcement
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 17, 2026
last_house_action: 6/25/2025 - Carried over, in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
last_senate_action: 3/17/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on Criminal Justice and Public Safety suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND PUBLIC SAFETY . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND PUBLIC SAFETY in concurrence

Reports READ . On motion of Representative HASENFUS of Readfield, the Majority Refer to Another Committee Report was ACCEPTED . On further motion of Representative HASENFUS of Readfield the Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on JUDICIARY . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
Report READ On motion by Senator BEEBE-CENTER of Knox Bill and accompanying papers COMMITTED to the Committee on Judiciary in concurrence Ordered sent down forthwith
Carried over, in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
